graph order
86
adjacency matrix

label vector
15 20 66 70 2 79 71 59 72 5 34 19 54 39 42 16 25 23 22 21 38 30 46 35 77 53 26 24 28 31 33 27 57 29 55 32 58 60 14 68 13 9 10 43 78 73 56 36 50 82 40 18 48 37 44 4 62 49 52 41 81 86 47 11 61 67 65 8 76 7 69 17 64 74 1 6 3 12 45 80 51 63 83 84 85 75
